description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.4 Docker image, defines variables HYPERSHOT_DEBUG=1, LANG=en_US.UTF-8, PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8, caches pip files in /root/.cache/pip/, and runs python3 -V in a global before_script. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a tox job that executes apt-get -qq update && apt-get -q install -y locales mediainfo, locale-gen "$LANG", locale, then runs python3 setup.py --version, pip3 install -r requirements-dev.txt, tox -e lint -- --reports=y, tox -e py34, and hypershot --config-dir=docs/examples templates, and stores the build/cov_html directory as an artifact that expires in 3 days. In the deploy stage add a docs job that installs tox with pip3 and runs tox -e docs. Also add a pages job that depends on the tox job, runs only on the master branch, moves build/cov_html to a public/ folder, and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact that expires in 30 days.
